name: Narendra Modi
education: MA Political Science (Distance), Gujarat University

controversies.title: 2002 Gujarat Riots
controversies.description: Accused of complicity in the 2002 Gujarat communal riots that killed 1,000+. Supreme Court gave him clean chit in 2022.

controversies.title: Electoral Bond Scheme
controversies.description: Introduced Electoral Bond scheme declared unconstitutional by Supreme Court in 2024 for lack of transparency.

controversies.title: Demonetisation
controversies.description: Unilateral demonetisation of ₹500 and ₹1000 notes caused massive economic disruption, 100+ deaths, long queues.

controversies.title: MGNREGS Budget Cuts
controversies.description: Reduced MGNREGS (rural employment) budget by ₹25,000 crore amid high unemployment.

name: Rahul Gandhi
position: Leader of Opposition, Lok Sabha; MP Rae Bareli
education: MPhil, Trinity College, Cambridge University

controversies.title: Rafale Deal Allegations
controversies.description: Alleged wrongdoing in Rafale fighter jet procurement. SC gave clean chit to government. Gandhi's comments in SC drawn as contempt.

controversies.title: Criminal Defamation - Modi Surname
controversies.description: Convicted by Surat court for criminal defamation for 'Modi surname thieves' remark. Disqualified as MP for 2 months. Supreme Court stayed the conviction.

controversies.title: Bharat Jodo Yatra Political Drama
controversies.description: Critics called Bharat Jodo march political stunt amid party organisational weaknesses.

children.name: None (unmarried)
children.note: Studied at Harvard (didn't complete degree), then MPhil Trinity College Cambridge

name: Arvind Kejriwal
position: National Convenor, AAP; Former CM Delhi (resigned Sep 2024)
education: B.Tech Mechanical Engineering, IIT Kharagpur

controversies.title: Delhi Excise Policy Scam
controversies.description: CBI and ED alleged ₹100 crore scam in new excise policy. Kejriwal arrested March 2024, granted bail by SC.

controversies.title: Sheesh Mahal Controversy
controversies.description: BJP alleged ₹33 crore spent on CM's official bungalow renovation (called 'Sheesh Mahal'). CAG report flagged irregularities.

controversies.title: Promise vs Reality: Free Electricity
controversies.description: Free electricity beyond 200 units subsidised but Delhi power tariff among highest in India. Subsidy burden rose ₹3,200 crore.

controversies.title: Delhi Election Loss 2025
controversies.description: AAP wiped out in Delhi, winning only 22 of 70 seats. Kejriwal lost his own New Delhi constituency by 4,000+ votes to BJP's Parvesh Verma.

children.name: Pulkit Kejriwal
children.note: Reported to have been in the US — raised political controversy during father's anti-corruption campaigns

name: Mamata Banerjee
education: MA History, Calcutta University; LLB

controversies.title: Sandeshkhali Violence Against Women
controversies.description: TMC leaders accused of land grab and sexual violence against women in Sandeshkhali. CBI/ED investigation ordered by HC.

controversies.title: RG Kar Hospital Rape-Murder
controversies.description: Trainee doctor raped and murdered in RG Kar Medical College. State police accused of evidence tampering. CBI took over investigation.

controversies.title: Rose Valley Chit Fund Scam
controversies.description: TMC leaders accused of connections with ₹17,000 crore Rose Valley Ponzi scheme. ED investigations ongoing.

controversies.title: TMC Syndicate Corruption
controversies.description: TMC party workers accused of running 'syndicate raj' — extorting money from construction projects, businesses across Bengal.

controversies.title: West Bengal School Jobs Scam
controversies.description: SC ordered CBI probe into alleged irregularities in 25,753 teacher appointments. Former education minister Partha Chatterjee arrested. ₹50 crore+ cash seized from his associate Arpita Mukherjee.

children.name: Abhishek Banerjee (nephew)
children.occupation: MP Diamond Harbour, TMC National General Secretary
children.note: Often considered her political heir, faces ED money laundering probe

name: Amit Shah
education: BSc Biochemistry, Gujarat University

controversies.title: Sohrabuddin Fake Encounter Case
controversies.description: Accused of role in fake encounter of gangster Sohrabuddin Sheikh and wife. Discharged by special CBI court in 2014.

controversies.title: Illegal Surveillance Allegations
controversies.description: Phone tapping controversy — alleged illegal surveillance of woman at Modi's behest when he was Gujarat CM. Revealed by The Caravan.

controversies.title: Electoral Bond Architect
controversies.description: As key strategist, co-designed Electoral Bond scheme declared unconstitutional by Supreme Court in 2024.

children.name: Jay Shah
children.occupation: ICC Chairman (elected Nov 2024); Former BCCI Secretary
children.note: Became youngest ICC Chairman in history at age 36 in November 2024. Controversy over rapid career rise through cricket board politics.

name: Akhilesh Yadav
position: MP Kannauj, Former CM Uttar Pradesh
education: BE Environmental Engineering, Mysore; MS, Univ. of Sydney, Australia

controversies.title: Goonda Tax / Extortion Allegations
controversies.description: SP government's tenure marked by goonda tax allegations, anti-romeo squad excesses, power sector corruption.

controversies.title: Mining Mafia Connection
controversies.description: UP mining mafia flourished during SP rule. CBI investigations linked SP-era officials to illegal sand mining worth billions.

name: Mayawati
position: BSP National President, Former CM UP (4 times)
education: BA Arts, Kalindi College, Delhi University; LLB

controversies.title: Disproportionate Assets Case
controversies.description: SC/IT raids revealed assets disproportionate to known income. BSP worker donations of crores raised eyebrows.

controversies.title: Taj Corridor Scam
controversies.description: Accused of corruption in Taj Heritage Corridor project. CBI filed FIR but SP Govt later dropped charges.

controversies.title: BSP Fund Misappropriation
controversies.description: IT Dept found discrepancies in BSP fund collection and Mayawati's personal accounts.

name: Nitish Kumar
education: BE Electrical Engineering, NIT Patna

controversies.title: Multiple Party Switches
controversies.description: Nitish Kumar switched alliances 7+ times — NDA to Mahagathbandhan to NDA — earning label 'Paltoo Ram' (turncoat) from opponents. Most recently switched BACK to NDA from INDIA bloc in February 2024 (left Mahagathbandhan). NDA won Bihar overwhelmingly in 2024 Lok Sabha.

controversies.title: Liquor Ban Failure
controversies.description: Total liquor ban in Bihar led to 73 deaths from hooch tragedy in 2021-22. Bootlegging flourished with alleged police connivance.

name: Yogi Adityanath
education: BSc Mathematics, HNB Garhwal University

controversies.title: Communal Violence Speeches
controversies.description: Multiple FIRs for hate speech and incitement. Arrested in 2007 for inciting communal violence in Gorakhpur.

controversies.title: Encounter Raj — 200+ Encounter Killings
controversies.description: UP Police conducted 10,000+ encounters, 200+ killed since 2017. Human rights groups raised concerns about extrajudicial killings.

controversies.title: Covid Management Failures
controversies.description: Bodies floating in Ganges, mass burial grounds exposed massive under-reporting of Covid deaths in UP.

controversies.title: Bulldozer Justice Controversy
controversies.description: SC issued guidelines in Oct 2024 against using bulldozers for punishing criminal suspects, citing UP's bulldozer demolitions as unconstitutional. Yogi's 'bulldozer baba' image under legal scrutiny.

name: Lalu Prasad Yadav
position: RJD Chief, Former CM Bihar, Former Railway Minister (serving bail in fodder scam)
constituency: Patna Sahib (lost 2024 Lok Sabha to BJP)
education: BA, Patna University; LLB

controversies.title: Fodder Scam — Convicted
controversies.description: Bihar fodder scam — ₹950 crore embezzled from Animal Husbandry dept. Convicted in 4 cases. Served jail time. 5-year election ban.

controversies.title: Land-For-Job Scam
controversies.description: As Railway Minister, CBI alleges he gave railway jobs in exchange for land transfers to family members.

controversies.title: Jungle Raj in Bihar
controversies.description: Bihar under Lalu's CM tenure (1990-97) saw near-collapse of law and order, known as 'Jungle Raj'. Kidnapping industries flourished.

children.name: Tejashwi Yadav
children.occupation: Leader of Opposition Bihar (Former Deputy CM)

children.name: Rohini Acharya
children.note: Was based in Singapore for years (husband lives there). Returned to contest Bihar Seemanchal constituency in 2024 bypolls but lost.

name: Smriti Irani
position: Former Union Minister, Lost Amethi 2024 to Kishori Lal Sharma (INC)
education: BA Part-1 (not completed), Delhi University; disputed degree controversy

controversies.title: Educational Qualification Controversy
controversies.description: Stated she had BA degree from Delhi University in 2004 affidavit, then BA Part 1 in 2014. Made HRD Minister despite disputed credentials.

controversies.title: Goa Bar Controversy
controversies.description: Her daughter allegedly ran a bar in Goa at underage. Family denied allegations; controversy sparked political storm.

controversies.title: FTII Controversy
controversies.description: As I&B Minister, appointed Gajendra Chauhan (TV actor) as FTII chair causing student protests and national debate.

controversies.title: Amethi 2024 Defeat
controversies.description: Lost to Congress's Kishori Lal Sharma by 1.67 lakh votes in a stunning reversal, having defeated Rahul Gandhi from Amethi in 2019.

name: Sharad Pawar
education: BA, Brihan Maharashtra College of Commerce

controversies.title: Maharashtra Co-operative Bank Scam
controversies.description: ED summoned Pawar over alleged irregularities in Maharashtra State Co-operative Bank worth ₹25,000 crore.

controversies.title: IPL Corruption Allegations
controversies.description: As BCCI president, faced calls to resign over IPL spot-fixing scandal and alleged conflict of interest.

controversies.title: NCP Split 2023
controversies.description: Nephew Ajit Pawar split NCP in July 2023, joined BJP-led Mahayuti government as Deputy CM. Supreme Court refused to give party name+symbol to Sharad faction initially. Sharad's NCP renamed NCP (Sharadchandra Pawar) — NCP(SP).

name: Priyanka Gandhi Vadra
position: MP Wayanad (won bypolls Nov 2024); AICC General Secretary
education: BA, Jesus and Mary College, Delhi University; Enrolled in Buddhist studies, Oxford (did not complete)

controversies.title: Robert Vadra Land Deals
controversies.description: Husband Robert Vadra faces ED probe for alleged money laundering via land deals in Haryana, Rajasthan, and DLF transactions. Vadra got land at below-market rates during Congress rule. ED has attached ₹200 crore+ assets.

controversies.title: Dynastic Politics Critique
controversies.description: Made parliamentary debut from Wayanad (vacated by brother Rahul Gandhi). Critics cite this as epitome of dynastic Congress politics — occupying a seat kept warm by family.

children.name: Raihan Vadra
children.occupation: Studied in UK (St Andrews University Scotland)
children.note: Studied at University of St Andrews, Scotland — controversy about foreign-educated Gandhi family children

name: Tejashwi Yadav
position: Leader of Opposition, Bihar Assembly; Former Deputy CM Bihar
education: Class 9 (did not complete formal education); cricketer in youth

controversies.title: Land-For-Job Scam — Main Accused
controversies.description: CBI alleges that as Railway Minister's son, land parcels were registered in his name and family members' names as kickbacks for railway jobs during Lalu's Railway Ministry (2004-09). Chargesheet filed naming him.

controversies.title: Disproportionate Assets
controversies.description: Declared ₹9 crore+ assets at age 26 — no clear income source declared. ED probe into unexplained wealth.

controversies.title: No Educational Qualification
controversies.description: Became Deputy CM of Bihar (2022) without completing Class 10. Critics questioned qualification. Highest qualification declared: Class 9.

name: Hemant Soren
education: Engineering dropout, Birsa Institute of Technology Sindri

controversies.title: Mining Lease Scam — Arrested
controversies.description: ED arrested Hemant Soren on Jan 31, 2024 in money laundering case linked to alleged illegal mining lease allocation. Resigned as CM before arrest. Spent 5 months in jail. Released on bail by Jharkhand HC in June 2024.

controversies.title: Re-elected After Jail
controversies.description: Despite ED arrest and jail time, JMM-INDIA bloc swept Jharkhand elections Nov 2024. Soren returned as CM — a rare political comeback from custody.

name: Sukhbir Singh Badal
position: SAD President; Former Deputy CM Punjab; Punished by Akal Takht
education: BBA, Thapar Institute of Engineering; MBA, San Jose State University, USA

controversies.title: Akal Takht Punishment — Served as Sewadar
controversies.description: Akal Takht (highest Sikh temporal authority) punished Sukhbir Singh Badal for 'mistakes' during SAD govt 2007-17 — including sacrilege incidents, dera pardon. He served as sewadar (servant) at Golden Temple in Dec 2024, shot at by attacker while doing seva.

controversies.title: Drug Menace During SAD Rule
controversies.description: Punjab's drug epidemic worsened during 2007-17 SAD-BJP rule. Sonu Mahajan report documented drug-politician nexus. Badal's govt accused of protecting drug runners.

controversies.title: Sacrilege Cover-up
controversies.description: Guru Granth Sahib desecration in Bargari 2015. SAD government accused of shielding perpetrators. Kotkapura police firing on protesters. Remains one of Punjab's most sensitive unresolved controversies.

children.name: Hannewal Badal
children.note: Sukhbir himself has MBA from San Jose State University, California

name: Nirmala Sitharaman
education: MA Economics, JNU Delhi; MPhil candidate, LSE London (incomplete)

controversies.title: Longest Budget Speech Ever
controversies.description: Her Feb 2020 Union Budget speech lasted 2 hours 42 minutes, the longest in Indian parliamentary history. She fainted mid-speech in 2019 due to exhaustion.

controversies.title: Electoral Bond Defense
controversies.description: Jointly presented and defended the Electoral Bond Scheme in Parliament which the Supreme Court unanimously struck down as unconstitutional in Feb 2024 for violating voters' right to information.

controversies.title: GST Multiple Rate Slabs Confusion
controversies.description: As Finance Minister, the complex GST system with 5 rate slabs (0%, 5%, 12%, 18%, 28%) she administered was criticised by economists and businesses for excessive complexity and compliance burden on small traders.

controversies.title: Inflation Not Addressed — Food Prices Spike
controversies.description: Retail food inflation hit 11.5% in July 2023. Tomatoes sold at ₹200/kg. Opposition blamed finance ministry's failure to control prices through fiscal/import policy.

children.name: Vangmayi Parakala
children.note: Daughter of Nirmala and her husband Parakala Prabhakar (economist/political commentator who has criticized BJP policies)

name: Rajnath Singh
education: MSc Physics, Gorakhpur University

controversies.title: S-400 Procurement Delay
controversies.description: Russia's S-400 missile system delivery delayed by Ukraine war sanctions concerns. India navigated US CAATSA sanctions threat — called a diplomatic success by some, risky gamble by others.

controversies.title: Galwan Valley Clash Initial Response
controversies.description: Initially India did not acknowledge the 20 soldier deaths in Galwan clash for several days. Opposition accused govt of downplaying the loss to China.

controversies.title: Defence Procurement Delays
controversies.description: India's defence indigenisation goals lagged. Despite Atmanirbhar push, critical systems like fighter jets, submarines remain import-dependent.

name: S. Jaishankar
education: MA, MPhil, PhD International Relations — Jawaharlal Nehru University; MA History, St. Stephen's College Delhi

controversies.title: India-China Border Standoff Handling
controversies.description: Credited with managing post-Galwan diplomacy but also criticised for slow disengagement at Depsang-Demchok. Full LAC disengagement not achieved till Oct 2024 — took 4+ years of talks.

controversies.title: Sacking Indian Ambassadors
controversies.description: As EAM, several senior IFS officers were not given expected postings — accusations of favouritism and bypassing seniority norms in foreign service.

controversies.title: Conflict of Interest — Son in Tata
controversies.description: Son Dhruva Jaishankar works for think tanks with corporate ties. Critics raised potential conflict of interest in trade negotiations. Not formally investigated.

children.name: Dhruva Jaishankar
children.occupation: Foreign policy analyst, think tanks; previously Brookings India, now Observer Research Foundation
children.note: Studied at Yale and Georgetown in the US — foreign-educated son of foreign minister

name: Nitin Gadkari
education: MCom, Nagpur University; LLB

controversies.title: Purti Group Loan Controversy
controversies.description: AAP accused Gadkari's Purti Group of taking loans using BJP workers as front investors and irregular crop purchases. Gadkari denied; BJP defended him. He was made to step down as BJP President briefly amid probe.

controversies.title: Highway Tolls and Land Acquisition Disputes
controversies.description: NHAI under Gadkari faced massive controversy over toll rates, excess collection, and aggressive land acquisition displacing farmers. Toll revenue exceeded ₹40,000 crore/year.

controversies.title: Openly Criticized BJP/Modi Government
controversies.description: Gadkari publicly criticized unemployment data, slow government decision-making, and called out political falsehoods. His remarks were widely seen as coded criticism of PM Modi — rare for a senior BJP minister.

name: MK Stalin
education: BA, Presidency College, Chennai (did not complete due to political activism)

controversies.title: Stalin Name Controversy
controversies.description: Named 'Stalin' by father Karunanidhi after Joseph Stalin — a name that drew criticism from various quarters for decades. Stalin himself denied any ideological affiliation with the Soviet dictator.

controversies.title: NEET Opposition — TN Autonomy Demand
controversies.description: Strongly opposes NEET (national medical entrance test) calling it discriminatory against state board students and Tamil Nadu's education system. Multiple student suicides linked to NEET pressure. TN assembly passed bills exempting state — pending Presidential assent.

controversies.title: Language Imposition Protest
controversies.description: Led protests against Hindi imposition in central govt services and NEP 2020's three-language formula. TN has a history of anti-Hindi agitations dating to 1965 riots.

controversies.title: Family Wealth Dispute
controversies.description: DMK family assets declared at ₹1,500+ crore. Opposition alleged undervaluation. Stalin's Kolathur residence and agricultural lands valued controversially in EC affidavit.

children.name: Udhayanidhi Stalin
children.occupation: Deputy CM Tamil Nadu, Film Producer, MLA Chepauk-Thiruvallikeni

name: Pinarayi Vijayan
education: Intermediate arts, Brennen College, Thalassery (dropped out)

controversies.title: SNC-Lavalin Power Scam
controversies.description: As Power Minister (1996-2001), CBI alleged ₹374 crore loss to Kerala in power project contracts awarded to Canadian firm SNC-Lavalin without proper tendering. CBI filed chargesheet. Kerala HC dismissed it. CBI appealed to Supreme Court — case dragged for 25+ years. SC upheld HC dismissal in 2019.

controversies.title: Life Mission Corruption
controversies.description: ED probed Life Mission housing project — alleged ₹1.42 crore was routed as bribe from UAE organisation through Swapna Suresh. Swapna (gold smuggling accused) alleged CM was involved. State contested allegations.

controversies.title: Gold Smuggling Case — Swapna Suresh Link
controversies.description: Gold smuggled in diplomatic baggage through UAE Consulate. Swapna Suresh — who worked with CMO's office — was a key accused. ED alleged 'high level political connections.' CM's office under scanner but no charges filed against Vijayan.

controversies.title: COVID Mismanagement Claims
controversies.description: Kerala initially praised globally for COVID response, but second wave was severe. Late lockdown decisions and the Thrissur Pooram festival allowed during pandemic drew criticism.

name: Siddaramaiah
education: LLB, University of Mysore

controversies.title: MUDA Scam — Prosecution Sanctioned
controversies.description: Karnataka Governor granted prosecution sanction against CM Siddaramaiah in Mysuru Urban Development Authority (MUDA) scam. Allegedly 14 sites worth ₹56 crore were irregularly allotted to his wife Parvathi. CM challenged Governor's order in HC. HC upheld Governor's sanction Sept 2024. SC stayed it temporarily.

controversies.title: Valmiki Corporation Scam
controversies.description: ₹89 crore from SC/ST Valmiki Development Corporation diverted. Congress state minister B. Nagendra arrested. Siddaramaiah as CM faces scrutiny for departmental oversight failure.

controversies.title: OBC Certificate Controversy
controversies.description: Questions raised about Siddaramaiah's OBC (Kuruba) community certificate validity and timeline of registration. He denied wrongdoing.

name: N. Chandrababu Naidu
education: MA Economics, Sri Venkateswara University, Tirupati

controversies.title: AP State Skill Development Corporation Scam — Arrested
controversies.description: YSRCP government arrested Naidu under AP State Skill Development Corporation scam (₹3,300 crore alleged). Spent 53 days in Rajamahendravaram jail. AP HC granted bail in Oct 2023. He returned to power in 2024, case seen as political vendetta by supporters.

controversies.title: Amaravati Capital Controversy
controversies.description: Chose Amaravati as AP's new capital after bifurcation. Accused of insider trading — land prices in Amaravati zone shot up before official announcement. Farmers allege they were duped into giving land cheaply.

controversies.title: Polavaram Project Cost Overruns
controversies.description: AP's Polavaram irrigation project cost ballooned from ₹16,010 crore (2014 estimate) to ₹55,548 crore+ (2023). Tribal displacement issues, land acquisition controversies.

children.name: Nara Lokesh
children.occupation: MLA Mangalagiri, TDP General Secretary; Minister in AP govt 2024
children.note: Studied at Stanford University, USA — TDP's tech-savvy second generation leader. Considered Naidu's political heir.

name: Bhagwant Mann
education: BA, LLB (incomplete); Stand-up Comedian by profession

controversies.title: Drunk at Frankfurt Airport
controversies.description: Accused of being drunk/unruly at Frankfurt airport during official foreign trip as MP. Video went viral. Later apologized to Parliament.

controversies.title: Punjab Intelligence HQ Video Leak
controversies.description: As CM, he shared a video touring the Punjab Police Intelligence HQ building — inadvertently revealing the sensitive facility's layout. Security experts raised concerns. He apologized.

controversies.title: Drug Menace — Slow Progress
controversies.description: Won Punjab election promising to eliminate drug menace. Drug trafficking continues to be rampant in Punjab despite some gangster crackdowns. Major Punjab gangs (Goldy Brar, Lawrence Bishnoi network) operate from abroad.

controversies.title: Moosewala Murder — Security Failure
controversies.description: Punjabi rapper Sidhu Moosewala murdered one day after AAP govt withdrew his security cover. Major controversy on security lapses. Lawrence Bishnoi gang claimed responsibility.

name: Himanta Biswa Sarma
education: LLB, Gauhati University; Political Science MA

controversies.title: Saradha Chit Fund Scam Link
controversies.description: As senior Congress minister in Assam, faced allegations of proximity to Saradha Group promoter Sudipta Sen. ED and CBI investigated. Later switched to BJP in 2015. SC-monitored probe did not formally charge him.

controversies.title: Assam NRC Aftermath — Detention Camps
controversies.description: 19 lakh people excluded from NRC Assam. As Health Minister then CM, oversaw detention camp conditions criticised by human rights groups and NHRC.

controversies.title: Bulldozer Operations Against Muslims
controversies.description: Bulldozer demolitions in Dhalpur, Sipajhar targeting alleged encroachments disproportionately affected Muslim communities. Human rights groups criticised targeting pattern. 2 protesters killed in police firing.

controversies.title: Disproportionate Assets — ₹18 Crore Jump
controversies.description: Assets jumped from ₹6.1 crore (2016 affidavit) to ₹185 crore (2021 affidavit) — a 30x increase on a minister's salary. Opposition demanded explanation.

children.name: Nandita Sarma (wife Riniki Bhuyan Sarma)
children.occupation: Wife is media baron — owns News Live TV channel (conflict of interest questioned)

name: Devendra Fadnavis
education: LLB, Government Law College, Nagpur; Diploma in Business Management

controversies.title: False Affidavit — Criminal Cases Not Disclosed
controversies.description: SC judgment 2014: Found guilty of not disclosing 2 pending criminal cases in his 2014 election affidavit — a violation that can disqualify an MP/MLA. SC directed EC to act. Case was later dropped.

controversies.title: NCP Split Mastermind
controversies.description: Widely credited as the political strategist behind Ajit Pawar's split from NCP in July 2023, bringing Ajit's faction into BJP-led Mahayuti. Critics called it constitutional manipulation. 'Midnight operation' — similar to 2019 Devendra-Ajit midnight swearing-in fiasco.

controversies.title: Irrigation Scam Links
controversies.description: ₹70,000 crore Maharashtra irrigation scam happened partly under BJP-supported projects. As CM 2014-19, was accused of slow prosecution of Congress-era scam beneficiaries while pursuing selective anti-corruption action.

name: Revanth Reddy
education: BTech, JNTU Hyderabad

controversies.title: Cash-for-Vote Scandal — Arrested by ACB
controversies.description: Anti-Corruption Bureau arrested Revanth Reddy for allegedly bribing a nominated MLA ₹50 lakh to vote for him in 2015 MLC elections. Video of cash exchange went viral. Was TDP MLA at that time. Released on bail.

controversies.title: Group-2 Exam Paper Leak Controversy
controversies.description: Telangana Group-2 Services exam paper leaked shortly after Revanth became CM. Exam cancelled. Opposition demanded resignation. CID investigation.

controversies.title: Phone Tapping Case — Against BRS
controversies.description: Revanth govt's SIT arrested ex-Telangana DGP for alleged phone tapping of opposition politicians, judges, journalists during KCR's BRS rule. BRS claimed it was political victimisation. SIT found evidence of widespread illegal surveillance.

name: K. Chandrashekar Rao
education: MA Telugu Literature, Osmania University

controversies.title: Phone Tapping Scandal
controversies.description: SIT found that KCR's BRS government conducted systematic illegal phone tapping of politicians, journalists, judges, and opposition leaders for political intelligence. Multiple officials arrested.

controversies.title: Cash-for-Jobs Allegations
controversies.description: Opposition alleged illegal cash payments for government jobs during BRS rule in Telangana. Multiple arrests by Telangana Anti-Corruption Bureau after Congress came to power.

controversies.title: Kaleshwaram Irrigation Scam
controversies.description: CAG report flagged massive irregularities in Kaleshwaram lift irrigation project costing ₹80,000 crore. Cost overruns, kickback allegations. Sluice gates collapsed in 2022.

controversies.title: Power Tariff Irregularities
controversies.description: Telangana discoms accumulated ₹1.5 lakh crore debt under BRS rule. Expensive power purchase agreements signed at non-transparent rates.

children.name: K. Taraka Rama Rao (KTR)
children.occupation: BRS Working President; Former IT Minister Telangana; Arrested in Formula-E payment case

children.name: K. Kavitha
children.occupation: Former MLC; Arrested by ED in Delhi Liquor Policy scam Mar 2024, released Sep 2024

name: Naveen Patnaik
position: BJD President; Former CM Odisha 2000-2024 (24 years)
education: History, Delhi University (incomplete); Long-time in France and USA before politics

controversies.title: Remote Control CM — VK Pandian Controversy
controversies.description: VK Pandian, a retired IAS officer and Patnaik's private secretary, became de-facto power centre of BJD govt. Accused of running parallel government. BJP weaponised 'outsider' Pandian (Tamil origin) against BJD. Pandian was parachuted to contest 2024 elections — BJD was wiped out, winning just 51 of 147 seats.

controversies.title: Odisha Train Accident — Balasore
controversies.description: Three-train collision at Bahanaga Bazar, Balasore killed 293+ people — India's deadliest rail accident in decades. While Railway Ministry (Central Govt) was responsible, state disaster response was scrutinised.

controversies.title: 24-Year Rule — Democratic Stagnation
controversies.description: Ruled Odisha for 24 consecutive years (longest serving non-NDA CM). While praised for stability and welfare schemes, critics said BJD suppressed meaningful opposition and democratic competition.

name: Shashi Tharoor
position: MP Thiruvananthapuram; INC Working Committee member
education: BA History, Presidency College, Kolkata; MPhil, Fletcher School, Tufts Univ., USA; PhD International Relations, Tufts University

controversies.title: Wife Sunanda Pushkar's Death — Abetment Case
controversies.description: Wife Sunanda Pushkar found dead in a Delhi hotel room in Jan 2014. Delhi Police filed abetment to suicide/murder charges against Tharoor. Sessions court discharged Tharoor in 2021 citing 'no reliable evidence.' Delhi HC reversed this in July 2023 — trial reinstated. Case ongoing.

controversies.title: IPL Kochi Franchise Controversy
controversies.description: As Minister of State, had interests in the Kochi IPL franchise (his then-partner Sunanda Pushkar had 'sweat equity'). Resigned from ministry amid conflict of interest controversy.

controversies.title: "Cattle Class" Tweet
controversies.description: Tweeted about travelling 'cattle class' (economy class) in solidarity with aam aadmi (common man) — caused controversy about elite politician's disconnect. As a government minister, he was expected to not mock public transport.

children.name: Ishaan Tharoor
children.note: Son from first marriage, works at Washington Post in the USA

children.name: Kanishk Tharoor
children.occupation: Author, writes on global politics; lives abroad

name: Asaduddin Owaisi
education: BA, Osmania University; Barrister-at-law, Lincoln's Inn, London, UK

controversies.title: Provocative Speeches — Charged under NSA
controversies.description: Detained under National Security Act (NSA) in 1999 for inflammatory speech. Has faced multiple FIRs for hate speech-adjacent remarks though charges were largely not upheld.

controversies.title: Brother Akbaruddin Owaisi — Hate Speech Conviction
controversies.description: Brother Akbaruddin Owaisi (MLA) convicted for communally provocative speech. Sentenced to 2 years. Asaduddin distanced himself but opposition frequently links both.

controversies.title: Vote Splitter Accusations
controversies.description: BJP and INC both accuse AIMIM of splitting Muslim votes — helping BJP win by dividing secular votes. AIMIM's presence in UP, Bihar, Gujarat seen as hurting opposition in close contests.

name: Uddhav Thackeray
position: Shiv Sena (UBT) Chief; Former CM Maharashtra (2019-2022)
constituency: None (Rajya Sabha, lost both contested seats)
education: Commerce graduate, Jai Hind College, Mumbai; Wildlife Photographer

controversies.title: Shiv Sena Split — Lost Party Name and Symbol
controversies.description: 42 of 55 Shiv Sena MLAs followed Eknath Shinde in rebellion, collapsed Uddhav's MVA government June 2022. Election Commission gave Eknath Shinde's faction the 'Shiv Sena' name and 'Bow and Arrow' symbol in Feb 2023. Uddhav now leads 'Shiv Sena (UBT)' — a humiliating loss after 60+ years of Thackeray family building the party.

controversies.title: COVID Lockdown Mismanagement
controversies.description: Maharashtra had India's highest COVID deaths. Second wave hit Mumbai-Pune belt hardest. Criticism of late lockdowns, oxygen shortage, vaccine procurement delays.

controversies.title: Alliance with Congress — Ideological Contradiction
controversies.description: Formed Maharashtra Vikas Aghadi with Congress and NCP — parties with diametrically opposite ideology to Shiv Sena's Hindutva. Was dubbed 'opportunistic' by BJP. Considered a key factor in losing Shiv Sena workers' loyalty.

children.name: Aaditya Thackeray
children.occupation: MLA Worli; Shiv Sena (UBT) Youth Leader

name: Eknath Shinde
education: SSLC (Matriculation); no college degree

controversies.title: Shiv Sena Rebellion — Constitutional Crisis
controversies.description: Broke away from Uddhav Thackeray with 40 rebel MLAs to Guwahati (Assam). Toppled MVA govt and became CM with BJP support. SC later ruled the Governor's action was flawed but said disqualification not feasible since assembly's 5-year term ended.

controversies.title: Alleged Land Deals During CM Tenure
controversies.description: Multiple media reports alleged that Shinde-era Maharashtra govt facilitated land deals and government contracts benefiting those close to him. Mahayuti lost 2024 Maha Lok Sabha elections initially.

controversies.title: Maharashtra Elections 2024 — Mahayuti Comeback
controversies.description: Despite losing ground in Lok Sabha 2024, Mahayuti (Shinde-BJP-Ajit NCP) swept Maharashtra Vidhan Sabha Nov 2024 with 230+ seats. Shinde's faction won 57/80 seats. PM Modi became Fadnavis as new CM, Shinde stepped aside.

name: Ajit Pawar
position: Deputy CM Maharashtra; NCP President (Ajit faction)
education: BSc Agriculture, Shri Shivaji Agriculture College, Amravati

controversies.title: Irrigation Scam — ₹70,000 Crore
controversies.description: Maharashtra Irrigation Dept under Ajit Pawar (Water Resources Minister 1999-2009, 2010-2014) saw ₹70,000 crore in contracts with 0% project completion in some cases. One of India's biggest water scam allegations. He was exonerated by NCP-Congress but investigated under BJP govt.

controversies.title: NCP Split — Joined BJP
controversies.description: Split NCP in July 2023 with 8 ministers, joined BJP-led Maharashtra govt as Deputy CM. Supreme Court stayed his 'rebel MLA' disqualification. Sharad Pawar (uncle/party founder) calls this a family and political betrayal.

controversies.title: 2019 Midnight Swearing-In Drama
controversies.description: In a dramatic midnight operation, Ajit Pawar was sworn in as Maharashtra Deputy CM under Devendra Fadnavis (BJP) without NCP sanction. Lasted only 80 hours — collapsed when NCP MLAs refused to join. Called 'greatest political drama of Indian democracy' by observers.

name: Sanjay Raut
position: Rajya Sabha MP; Shiv Sena (UBT) Chief Spokesperson
education: BA, Ruparel College, Mumbai; Journalist

controversies.title: Patra Chawl Land Scam — Arrested by ED
controversies.description: ED arrested Sanjay Raut on July 31, 2022 in ₹1,000+ crore alleged money laundering case. Linked to redevelopment of Patra Chawl housing society in Mumbai. Spent over 100 days in jail. Released on bail in Nov 2022. Trial ongoing.

controversies.title: Wife's Dalit Loan Controversy
controversies.description: Wife Varsha Raut received ₹55 lakh in alleged loan from Swapna Patkar (associate of accused in Patra Chawl scam). Raut said it was a personal loan; ED called it money laundering proceeds.

controversies.title: Inflammatory Statements on Constitutional Institutions
controversies.description: Known for provocative media statements. Made derogatory remarks about Maharashtra Governor, election commissioners — attracted privilege motion threats in Rajya Sabha.

name: Farooq Abdullah
position: MP Srinagar; National Conference President; Former CM J&K
education: MBBS, SMS Medical College, Jaipur

controversies.title: J&K Cricket Board Scam
controversies.description: CBI probe into J&K Cricket Association funds misappropriation under Farooq Abdullah's presidency. ₹43 crore alleged irregularities in BCCI grants. Case ongoing for a decade.

controversies.title: Detained Under PSA (2019)
controversies.description: Detained under Public Safety Act (PSA) after abrogation of Article 370 in August 2019. Spent months under detention at his own home. Detention described as arbitrary by opposition and international observers.

controversies.title: China-Support Comments
controversies.description: Made remarks seemingly supportive of China in India-China border dispute context. Caused huge controversy, accused of anti-national sentiment. He later clarified his position.

name: Omar Abdullah
education: BSc, Sydenham College of Commerce, Mumbai

controversies.title: Detained Under PSA 2019
controversies.description: Detained under Public Safety Act (PSA) for 8 months after Article 370 abrogation. He was among the first leaders detained. Later wrote about the ordeal. International observers criticised India's detention of mainstream elected leaders.

controversies.title: J&K Became Union Territory — Political Loss
controversies.description: Under his 2009-2014 CM tenure J&K was full state with special status. By 2019, during NDA rule, J&K lost both statehood (downgraded to UT) and Article 370 special status — a major political setback for NC ideology.

controversies.title: Statehood Not Restored — NC Demand
controversies.description: J&K restored to Assembly rule but NOT to full statehood. Omar became CM of UT (not state). PM Modi promised statehood restoration 'at appropriate time.' NC considers full statehood restoration its primary demand.

children.name: Zahir Abdullah
children.note: Omar divorced wife Payal Nath (daughter of Prem Nath Nath, INC leader). Children largely live abroad.

name: Chirag Paswan
position: Union Minister (Food Processing); MP Hajipur; LJP (Ram Vilas) President
education: Studied acting at FTII Pune; BSc, Shri Ram College of Commerce, Delhi

controversies.title: LJP Split — Fought Own Uncle Pashupati Paras
controversies.description: Chirag used his father (late Ram Vilas Paswan)'s legacy to expel uncle Pashupati Kumar Paras from LJP president post. EC awarded 'LJP (Ram Vilas)' name to Chirag after long battle. His own NDA relationship improved when he won in 2024.

controversies.title: Acted Against NDA in Bihar 2020
controversies.description: In Bihar 2020 elections, Chirag contested seats against JDU (Nitish Kumar's party) even though both were NDA allies — helping split NDA votes deliberately. Many accused him of working against NDA from within. JDU was weakened.

controversies.title: Claims of Dalit-Child of Hanuman
controversies.description: Fashioned himself as 'Desh ka Chirag' (Light of the country) and 'Bajrang Bali ka bachcha' (Son of Hanuman) — an unusual identity politics mix for a Dalit leader traditionally associated with Ambedkarite movements.

name: Supriya Sule
education: BA, University of Mumbai; MBA candidate; University of California Berkeley

controversies.title: Baramati vs Baramati — Cousin-in-Law Battle
controversies.description: In 2024 Lok Sabha, Supriya Sule fought against Sunetra Pawar (wife of cousin Ajit Pawar) from Baramati constituency. Unprecedented family vs family battle. Supriya won by 1.5 lakh votes — repudiation of Ajit's NCP split.

controversies.title: Dynastic Politics
controversies.description: Daughter of Sharad Pawar, one of India's most powerful politicians. Critics call her a pure dynasty product — though she's built her own political identity in Baramati.

controversies.title: Maharashtra Cooperative Bank Probe
controversies.description: As daughter of Sharad Pawar who headed the Maharashtra State Cooperative Bank, faced questions about the ₹25,000 crore alleged scam. No charges directly against her.

children.name: Vir Sadashiv Patankar
children.note: Son studied and works in the United States

name: Jyotiraditya Scindia
position: Union Minister Telecommunications; Former Congress MP
education: AB Economics, Harvard University, USA; MBA, Stanford Graduate School of Business, USA

controversies.title: Defection to BJP — Toppled MP Congress Govt
controversies.description: Resigned from Congress in March 2020 with 22 MLAs, joining BJP and collapsing Kamal Nath's Congress government in MP (which had 114/230 seats). Critics called it 'anti-democratic defection.' He got Rajya Sabha seat and ministry in return.

controversies.title: Gwalior Royal Family — Inherited Wealth
controversies.description: Declared ₹374 crore assets in 2019. Son of Madhavrao Scindia (former aviation minister). Old Gwalior Maharaja family with 800+ year legacy — immense inherited wealth including palaces, agricultural land.

controversies.title: Harvard-Stanford Roots, MP Problems
controversies.description: Constituency Guna among MP's most backward areas. Despite Harvard-Stanford education and ministerial power, Guna's development indicators lag. Critics cite disconnect between elite background and ground reality.

children.name: Ananya Raje Scindia
children.note: Scindia himself educated at Harvard and Stanford

name: Shivraj Singh Chouhan
position: Union Agriculture Minister; Former CM Madhya Pradesh (4 terms)
education: MA Philosophy, Bhopal University

controversies.title: Vyapam Scam — India's Biggest Jobs Scam
controversies.description: MP's Professional Examination Board (Vyapam) was involved in systematic cheating ring for government jobs and medical admissions. 2,000+ accused arrested, 40+ mysterious deaths of witnesses/accused. Happened during Chouhan's CM tenure. CBI took over probe. HC found systemic rot.

controversies.title: Farmer Suicides — 2017 Mandsaur Firing
controversies.description: 5 farmers killed in police firing at Mandsaur during farmer protests against low MSP. Chouhan was CM. Incident shocked nation. He apologized and promised compensation.

controversies.title: Madhya Pradesh Became 'BIMARU' Again?
controversies.description: MP's Human Development Index remained among India's lowest despite 18+ years of BJP rule under Chouhan. Critics said governance prioritized central transfers over structural development.

name: Manohar Lal Khattar
education: BA, Arya College, Ambala

controversies.title: Haryana Farmer Protests — 2021
controversies.description: Haryana police blocked protesting farmers at state borders during 2020-21 farm law protests. Water cannons, tear gas used in peak winter. Khattar government accused of heavy-handedness against Punjabi/Haryanvi farmers.

controversies.title: Karnal Lathi Charge — IAS officer ordered lathicharge
controversies.description: IAS officer Ayush Sinha issued order to police to 'break heads' of protesting farmers at Karnal. Video went viral. National uproar. Government eventually suspended and settled with farmers after protests.

controversies.title: Nuh Violence Haryana 2023
controversies.description: Communal violence in Nuh district, Haryana killed 6+. VHP procession attacked. Retaliatory violence. Bulldozer demolitions of Muslim properties triggered national debate. Khattar government under scrutiny.

name: Bhupendra Patel
education: Diploma in Civil Engineering, Gujarat University

controversies.title: Shadow of Modi — Seen as Proxy CM
controversies.description: Installed as Gujarat CM in 2021 replacing Vijay Rupani just 4 months before elections. Seen as a placeholder/loyal RSS pracharak with no independent political identity. Critics say real power lies with Modi-Shah even in Gujarat governance.

controversies.title: Morbi Bridge Collapse
controversies.description: Britain-era Morbi suspension bridge collapsed killing 135+ people. Bridge was reopened after 'renovation' without safety certificates. Oreva Group given maintenance contract without proper tendering. Bhupendra Patel govt faced negligence criticism.

controversies.title: AAP Leader Arrested Before Gujarat Elections
controversies.description: AAP's Gopal Italia arrested on sedition charges days before 2022 Gujarat elections. Critics called it political vendetta. SC granted bail. BJP swept Gujarat with 156/182 seats.

name: Pushkar Singh Dhami
education: LLB, Lucknow University

controversies.title: Lost Own Seat — Became CM After Defeat
controversies.description: Lost his own Khatima constituency in 2022 Uttarakhand elections but BJP made him CM anyway. Won Champawat bypoll. This violates spirit of electoral accountability — constitutionally allowed for 6 months but politically criticised.

controversies.title: Uniform Civil Code — Uttarakhand First State
controversies.description: Uttarakhand became first Indian state to implement Uniform Civil Code (UCC). Opposition said it targeted Muslim personal law. Dhami seen as BJP's face on UCC implementation.

controversies.title: Joshimath Sinking — Delayed Response
controversies.description: Joshimath town in Uttarakhand began sinking from massive construction-induced land subsidence. 600+ houses cracked. Emergency displacement of thousands. State government criticized for delayed response and continued tunnel/NTPC projects near the city.

name: Sukhwinder Singh Sukhu
education: MA, Himachal Pradesh University; LLB

controversies.title: HP Financial Crisis — OPS Burden
controversies.description: Sukhu's Congress govt restored Old Pension Scheme (OPS) fulfilling election promise — but it added ₹2,000+ crore annual burden to HP's already debt-laden finances. HP has one of India's highest debt-to-GSDP ratios.

controversies.title: Congress MLAs Revolt — Almost Lost Govt
controversies.description: 6 Congress MLAs voted against the state budget — a rare rebellion. Cross-voted in Rajya Sabha elections (BJP candidate won). Sukhu survived only with Governor intervention and anti-defection action against rebel MLAs. Shows fragile political hold.

controversies.title: Apple Growers' Protests
controversies.description: HP apple farmers protested against high import duties, infrastructure issues, low MSP, and alleged cartelization by cold storage companies. Sukhu govt promised action but implementation delayed.

name: Bhajan Lal Sharma
education: MA, Rajasthan University

controversies.title: Surprise CM Choice — Over Vasundhara Raje
controversies.description: BJP bypassed Vasundhara Raje (senior BJP leader, 2x Rajasthan CM) to install relatively unknown first-time MLA Bhajan Lal Sharma. Seen as Modi-Shah asserting control over state BJP politics. Raje supporters were furious.

controversies.title: Paper Leaks — Rajasthan Exam Fraud
controversies.description: Multiple competitive exam papers (REET, SI recruitment) leaked under previous Congress and now BJP govts. Rajasthan became infamous nationally for paper leak culture. New govt promised anti-paper leak law.

controversies.title: Revenue Intelligence HQ Shooting
controversies.description: A man entered Revenue Intelligence Office in Jaipur and opened fire. Security lapses exposed. Highlights law and order concerns in state capital.

name: Mohan Yadav
education: PhD History, Vikram University, Ujjain

controversies.title: Bypass of Experienced Leaders — Surprise CM
controversies.description: BJP bypassed Shivraj Singh Chouhan (4x CM) and Narottam Mishra to install Mohan Yadav — sending a message about OBC outreach for 2024 Lok Sabha elections. Shock appointment for party insiders.

controversies.title: Criminal Cases Declared in Affidavit
controversies.description: Declared 2 pending criminal cases in 2023 election affidavit. One case related to an alleged incident in 2004, another in 2008. Details in EC affidavit.

controversies.title: Ujjain Mahakal Corridor — Land Acquisition Disputes
controversies.description: Ujjain Mahakal Temple Corridor, inaugurated by PM Modi, displaced several hundred families. Compensation disputes led to protests. Mohan Yadav as MP overseen the process, faced local backlash.

name: Nayab Singh Saini
education: BA Political Science, Kurukshetra University

controversies.title: Replacement of Khattar — 6 Months Before Election
controversies.description: BJP replaced Khattar with Saini just months before Haryana elections. This 'CM churn' strategy (install new CM to neutralise anti-incumbency) was seen as political trickery. BJP eventually won Oct 2024 elections surprisingly.

controversies.title: Farmers Protests — Shambhu Border Standoff
controversies.description: Haryana police blocked farmers marching to Delhi from Shambhu border using teargas, concrete barricades, drones. Kinnaur farmer Shubhkaran Singh died after being shot with rubber bullets. Major controversy about farmer rights.

controversies.title: Agniveer Scheme Controversy
controversies.description: As Haryana CM, had to implement controversial Agnipath/Agniveer 4-year short-term army recruitment scheme. Haryana has traditionally high army recruitment. Youth protests against Agniveer happened across Haryana.

name: Mohan Majhi
education: MA, Fakir Mohan University

controversies.title: Criminal Cases — Filed by Tribals
controversies.description: 4 pending criminal cases declared in 2024 affidavit. Cases primarily relating to protests/demonstrations from his opposition years. ADR flagged as concerning.

controversies.title: Odisha Mining Corruption — End of BJD Era
controversies.description: Ended 24 years of BJD rule in Odisha. Installed as CM over senior leaders, signalling Modi-Shah's preference for tribal CM. Will have to deal with massive post-BJD corruption cases in Odisha mining sector.

controversies.title: Anti-Conversion Law Push
controversies.description: Plans to enact tough anti-conversion law in tribal-dominated Odisha — targeting Christian missionary activities. Opposition and Christians communities protested.

name: Kamal Nath
position: Former CM Madhya Pradesh; MP Chhindwara; INC Senior Leader
education: BA, Doon School (secondary); St. Xavier's College, Calcutta

controversies.title: 1984 Sikh Riots Alleged Role
controversies.description: Accused by multiple witnesses and fact-finding committees of leading a mob of 2,000+ attacking a Sikh gurudwara and gas station during 1984 anti-Sikh riots after Indira Gandhi's assassination. Never charged or convicted. Has denied all allegations. Major unresolved controversy.

controversies.title: MP Horse-Trading — Lost Govt in 15 Months
controversies.description: Congress govt in MP with 114 seats lost 22 MLAs to BJP in March 2020 Jyotiraditya Scindia defection. Govt fell after 15 months. CBI raided multiple offices/residences linked to Kamal Nath even as opposition leader.

controversies.title: Anti-India Comments Alleged
controversies.description: BJP accused Kamal Nath of India-critical statements before MP elections. Nath denied, said remarks were misrepresented. Lost MP elections Dec 2023 to BJP.

children.name: Nakul Nath
children.occupation: MP Chhindwara (won 2024 despite Kamal Nath's political troubles)

name: Vasundhara Raje
position: Former CM Rajasthan (2x); BJP Senior Leader
education: Economics, Sophia College, Mumbai

controversies.title: Sanjay Dutt Passport Controversy
controversies.description: As External Affairs Minister (Vajpayee era), raised questions about her role in facilitating passport for actor Sanjay Dutt (then accused in TADA case). Cleared by inquiry but controversy persisted.

controversies.title: Lalit Modi Affair — Visa Controversy
controversies.description: Was found to have recommended (in affidavit) to UK authorities that Lalit Modi (disgraced IPL founder, facing ED probe) be given travel documents. Both Vasundhara and Sushma Swaraj faced demands for resignation.

controversies.title: Bypassed for Rajasthan CM 2023
controversies.description: Modi-Shah bypassed Vasundhara Raje despite BJP's comfortable majority in Rajasthan 2023, installing first-time MLA Bhajan Lal Sharma instead. Seen as marginalisation of Raje faction within BJP. She stayed sulking on the sidelines during campaign.

children.name: Dushyant Singh
children.occupation: MP Jhalawar-Baran; married to Niharika Raje who is related to Kiran Mazumdar Shaw
children.note: Dushyant Singh studied in USA and is MP from Jhalawar-Baran

name: HD Kumaraswamy
position: Union Minister (Heavy Industries); Former CM Karnataka
education: BSc, Vishweswaraiah Institute of Technology, Bengaluru

controversies.title: Bellary Mining Scam — Family Links
controversies.description: Karnataka's Bellary region iron ore mining scam under BJP-JD(S) govts. CAG reported ₹16,085 crore loss. Gali Janardhana Reddy (Bellary miner) had close ties with JD(S) govt. Kumaraswamy's family links investigated.

controversies.title: Da(u)d: Leaked Audio Tape
controversies.description: Audio tape of conversation between Kumaraswamy and a mining baron (allegedly Gali Janardhana Reddy) surfaced — discussing mining concessions in exchange for political support. Called 'CM tape' — denied authenticity but caused major political damage.

controversies.title: JD(S)-BJP Coalition — Party Switch
controversies.description: JD(S) had been avowedly anti-BJP for decades. HD Deve Gowda (father, ex-PM) opposed BJP strongly. But HD Kumaraswamy aligned JD(S) with BJP for 2024 elections — abandoned secular-JD(S) ideology for power. Won Mandya. Got ministerial berth.

children.name: Nikhil Kumaraswamy
children.occupation: JD(S) politician, Actor (Kannada films), Contested elections

name: Piyush Goyal
position: Union Minister Commerce & Industry; Rajya Sabha MP
education: CA (Chartered Accountant); LLB, Mumbai University

controversies.title: Electricity Sector Privatisation Controversy
controversies.description: Electricity Amendment Bill 2020 tabled under his Ministries period (Power Ministry earlier). State DISCOMs opposed it. Farmers feared end of subsidised power.

controversies.title: Railway Safety Record — Accidents During Tenure
controversies.description: Multiple train derailments and accidents in 2017-18 when he was Railway Minister. He blamed saboteurs. Critics pointed to deferred maintenance, budget cuts.

controversies.title: Wealth Jump — Declared ₹78 Crore Assets
controversies.description: Declared ₹78 crore assets in 2023 Rajya Sabha affidavit. His family (father Vedprakash Goyal was BJP Treasurer) has extensive business interests raising perpetual conflict-of-interest questions.

name: Dimple Yadav
education: BA, Chandigarh University

controversies.title: Dynastic Political Entry
controversies.description: Won Kannauj Lok Sabha in 2012 uncontested — when all other candidates withdrew after Akhilesh Yadav became CM. Critics called it proxy election — not a genuine democratic choice. Symbol of dynastic politics.

controversies.title: Mainpuri Seat — Mulayam's Legacy
controversies.description: Won Mainpuri bypass election in 2022 after death of Mulayam Singh Yadav. Contested and held the family's 'pocket borough' seat. Now holds Mainpuri for SP family.

controversies.title: No Independent Political Identity Critique
controversies.description: Political analysts consistently note she has no independent identity beyond being Akhilesh's wife. In Parliament, speaks rarely. Critics say she's occupying a seat that could go to a non-dynastic leader.

name: Jayant Chaudhary
position: Union Minister Skill Development; MP Baghpat; RLD Chief
education: BA Politics, Philosophy, Economics, Oxford University, UK

controversies.title: Switched from INDIA Bloc to NDA
controversies.description: Was in INDIA alliance with SP. Pulled out of INDIA bloc days before 2024 Lok Sabha elections and joined NDA. Opposition called it betrayal of farmers who supported him after farm law protests. He won Baghpat convincingly.

controversies.title: Grandfather Charan Singh — PM Narrative
controversies.description: Grandfather Charan Singh was conferred Bharat Ratna in 2024 (posthumously) — after RLD joined NDA. Opposition called it political 'gift' to get RLD support. Jayant is seen as using grandfather's legacy rather than building own identity.

controversies.title: Oxford-Educated, Rural Voter Base Disconnect
controversies.description: Oxford-educated Union Minister from UP's Jat farming community — rare combination. Critics note disconnect between elite education and the rural agrarian issues of his constituency Baghpat.

name: JP Nadda
position: BJP National President; Union Minister Health
education: LLB, Patna University; BA, Patna College

controversies.title: HP Elections Loss — Own Home State
controversies.description: As BJP President, BJP lost to Congress in Himachal Pradesh 2022 elections — embarrassment since it's his home state. Amit Shah publicly blamed incumbency and internal party issues.

controversies.title: West Bengal Attack on Convoy
controversies.description: BJP President's convoy was allegedly attacked by TMC workers in Diamond Harbour during WB poll campaign visit. Stone pelting on his vehicle — captured on video. Central forces deployed, caused state vs centre standoff.

controversies.title: Seen as Modi-Shah Proxy
controversies.description: Critics say Nadda as BJP president has no independent voice and acts only as operational arm of Modi-Shah. 'First among equals' in name only. Organisation has become extremely centralised.

children.name: Harshvardhan Nadda
children.occupation: Son, active in Himachal Pradesh BJP

name: Dharmendra Pradhan
position: Union Minister Education; Rajya Sabha MP
education: MA Political Science, Utkal University

controversies.title: NEET Paper Leak Crisis — Biggest Exam Scandal
controversies.description: NEET-UG 2024 paper leaked. 67 students scored perfect 720/720 (unprecedented). CBI arrested several people. States demanded scrapping NEET. As Education Minister, Pradhan faced massive opposition calls to resign. NEET-PG postponed. Government set up high-level review committee.

controversies.title: NEP 2020 — Three-Language Formula Controversy
controversies.description: National Education Policy 2020 with three-language formula faced Tamil Nadu-led protests accusing it of Hindi imposition. Pradhan as Education Minister defended NEP despite south India objections.

controversies.title: UGC-NET Cancellation 2024
controversies.description: UGC-NET exam cancelled a day after it was held due to integrity concerns. Dark web leak alleged. Second major exam controversy in same month as NEET scandal.

name: Vishnu Deo Sai
education: BA, Govt. College Jashpur

controversies.title: Maoist Violence in Bastar — State Response
controversies.description: Chhattisgarh CM since Dec 2023 under whom security forces conducted major Maoist operations in Bastar. 200+ Maoists killed in 2024 — highest ever. Opposition and human rights groups allege some were fake encounters.

controversies.title: Adivasi Displacement — Mining
controversies.description: Mining expansion in Chhattisgarh's tribal belt continues displacing Adivasi communities. Vishnu Deo Sai, himself a tribal (ST) CM, faces criticism for prioritising corporate mining over tribal forest rights.

controversies.title: Surprise CM — Over Senior BJP Leaders
controversies.description: Installed as CM to fulfil Modi's promise of a tribal CM for CG. Bypassed senior BJP leaders Raman Singh and Brijmohan Agrawal. ST CM status seen as BJP's electoral strategy for tribal votes.

name: Abhishek Banerjee
position: MP Diamond Harbour; TMC National General Secretary; Mamata's nephew
education: BBA, University of London (Distant, Jadavpur campus); MA Politics, Calcutta University

controversies.title: Coal Scam — ED Summons
controversies.description: ED summoned Abhishek multiple times in Bengal coal scam involving ₹1,300 crore. His wife Rujira Banerjee (Thai national) also summoned. They challenged summons in SC. Case ongoing.

controversies.title: Rujira Banerjee Passport Controversy
controversies.description: Wife Rujira Banerjee (Thai national) obtained Indian passport on address of a relative — scrutinised under passport rules. SC took suo motu cognizance of MEA's permission for travel without passport.

controversies.title: Rapid Rise — Zero-to-National-GS in 5 years
controversies.description: Rose from being a politically unknown young man to General Secretary of national party solely due to being Mamata's nephew. Critics say TMC has become a family party — 'Banerjee Parivar vs Everyone.'

children.name: Son and daughter (young)
children.occupation: Children of Abhishek and Rujira (Thai-origin wife)

name: Aaditya Thackeray
position: MLA Worli; Yuva Sena President; Uddhav's Son
education: BA Politics, University of Mumbai; St. Xavier's College; Yale University (Environment Policy, Short Program)

controversies.title: Disha Salian Death Mystery
controversies.description: Talent manager Disha Salian died days before actor Sushant Singh Rajput's death. BJP accused Aaditya Thackeray of involvement at a party she attended before her death. Police investigations found no involvement. BJP called it politically motivated after Sena-Congress-NCP alliance formed.

controversies.title: Mahayuti Victory — UBT Struggles
controversies.description: Aaditya won Worli in Nov 2024 Maha elections but UBT won only 20 of 95 seats. The Thackeray political legacy has shrunk dramatically since MVA 2019. Aaditya seen as future UBT leader but faces uphill battle.

controversies.title: Environmental Activism vs Mumbai Development
controversies.description: As Environment Minister in MVA govt, pushed Coastal Road, Metro projects that environmental groups said harmed Aarey forest and sea ecology. His rhetoric on environment contrasted with policy decisions.

name: Chandrashekhar Azad
position: MP Nagina; Azad Samaj Party (Kanshi Ram) President
education: LLB, incomplete; primarily community organiser

controversies.title: Bhim Army — Violence Allegations
controversies.description: Bhim Army (which he founded) was accused by UP Police of instigating violence in caste clashes in Saharanpur 2017. Chandrashekhar arrested under NSA, spent 16 months in jail. SC ordered his release. Case seen as political persecution by Dalit rights groups.

controversies.title: Protest at Jantar Mantar
controversies.description: Led demonstrations at Jantar Mantar for Hathras gang-rape victim's justice. Case of Dalit woman who died after rape in UP. UP police handling of case was strongly criticised nationally.

controversies.title: Criminal Cases — All Protest-Related
controversies.description: 7 pending criminal cases — all related to Dalit rights protests, demonstrations, and confrontations with UP police during Yogi Adityanath govt. He calls them cases of state repression.

name: Tejasvi Surya
position: MP Bangalore South; BJYM National President
education: LLB, R.V. Law College, Bengaluru

controversies.title: Social Media Communal Posts
controversies.description: Twitter post against Muslim meat traders during COVID lockdown went viral — accused of communal targeting under guise of lockdown enforcement. FIR registered in Karnataka.

controversies.title: Sexual Harassment Allegations (unproven)
controversies.description: Anonymous allegations on social media about past behaviour. He denied all allegations. No FIR filed, no police investigation.

controversies.title: Youngest BJP MP — Rapid Rise
controversies.description: Won Bangalore South at 28 — youngest BJP MP in 2019. Made BJYM (youth wing) president. Critics say rise was more due to ideological alignment with Hindutva than grassroots work.

name: Anurag Thakur
position: MP Hamirpur; Former Sports Minister; BJP Leader
education: BA, Doaba College, Jalandhar

controversies.title: Anti-Muslim Hate Speech Chant
controversies.description: Led 'desh ke gaddaro ko, goli maaro saalon ko' (shoot the traitors) chant at BJP rally during Delhi elections. SC took suo motu notice. He was removed from campaigning. FIR registered for hate speech incitement (section 153A).

controversies.title: BCCI Conflict of Interest
controversies.description: Was Himachal Pradesh Cricket Association president while being Union Minister of State for Finance — conflict of interest under BCCI constitution and MCC guidelines. SC-appointed Lodha Committee raised objections.

controversies.title: Dropped from Cabinet After Lok Sabha Loss (indirect)
controversies.description: BJP performed below expectations in HP in 2024 LS. Anurag Thakur, the state BJP's face, was removed from Cabinet by PM Modi — seen as accountability for underperformance in HP.
